```
   ▄██████▄     ▄████████   ▄▄▄▄███▄▄▄▄      ▄████████         ▄█   ▄█▄ 
  ███    ███   ███    ███ ▄██▀▀▀███▀▀▀██▄   ███    ███        ███ ▄███▀ 
  ███    █▀    ███    ███ ███   ███   ███   ███    █▀         ███▐██▀   
 ▄███          ███    ███ ███   ███   ███  ▄███▄▄▄           ▄█████▀    
▀▀███ ████▄  ▀███████████ ███   ███   ███ ▀▀███▀▀▀          ▀▀█████▄    
  ███    ███   ███    ███ ███   ███   ███   ███    █▄         ███▐██▄   
  ███    ███   ███    ███ ███   ███   ███   ███    ███        ███ ▀███▄ 
  ████████▀    ███    █▀   ▀█   ███   █▀    ██████████        ███   ▀█▀ 
                                                              ▀

This is the story of a developer who would like to become a hacker
```
